name: NT Precious Metals
description: Niyam Turakhia — Precious Metals MIS Dashboard (Next.js + SQLite) [:3020]
start_cmd: export HOME=/root PM2_HOME=/root/.pm2; cd /var/www/nt-metals && /usr/bin/pm2 start npm --name nt-metals -- start
status_cmd: export HOME=/root PM2_HOME=/root/.pm2; test -n "$(/usr/bin/pm2 pid nt-metals 2>/dev/null | head -1)" && test "$(/usr/bin/pm2 pid nt-metals 2>/dev/null | head -1)" != "0" && echo running
